summary_en: A careful overview page explaining why Jain minority status matters and which official departments may be relevant when checking eligibility or documentation.
eligibility_en: Please review the latest official policy or department note for the exact scope, applicable states, and current process.
benefit_en: Helps families and institutions identify the right starting point before relying on a scheme, certificate, or office process.
documents_required_en: Identity proof, address proof, and any official forms requested by the relevant authority.

summary_en: A reference page for families and students who want to understand where minority scholarship information is usually published and how to verify current cycles.
eligibility_en: Eligibility varies by provider, year, income criteria, institution type, and state rules.
benefit_en: May help students locate verified starting points for scholarship research without assuming approval or fixed benefits.
documents_required_en: Mark sheets, identity proof, bank details, income proof, and institution documents are commonly requested.

title_en: Documents usually required for scholarship applications
title_hi: Documents usually required for scholarship applications
summary_en: A practical checklist showing the kinds of documents applicants often need before starting a scholarship or aid application.
summary_hi: Documents usually required for scholarship applications
eligibility_en: Useful for students, parents, and volunteers preparing application support checklists.
benefit_en: Can reduce delays by helping applicants collect likely documents before a deadline opens.
documents_required_en: Photo ID, address proof, mark sheets, income records, bank passbook, passport-size photo, and institution letter may be required.

summary_en: A placeholder-ready directory structure for state minority commissions and related offices that may publish official notices, contact details, or grievance channels.
eligibility_en: Open to anyone researching state-level offices and official contact points.
benefit_en: Helps users move from general discussion to the correct state authority or commission website.
documents_required_en: Not applicable for browsing. Specific complaint or application processes may require official documents.

summary_en: A directory structure for Jain schools, colleges, pathshalas, libraries, hostels, and study centers that can later be expanded with verified entries.
eligibility_en: Useful for students, parents, researchers, and community organizers.
benefit_en: Supports discovery of institutions and direct contact with official admission or administration sources.
documents_required_en: Directory browsing does not require documents. Individual institutions may have separate admission requirements.

summary_en: A starting directory for Jain trusts, charities, and NGOs involved in education, seva, health, heritage, and community support.
eligibility_en: Varies by organization, location, and the type of help being requested.
benefit_en: Helps families and volunteers identify which organization may be relevant before contacting them directly.
documents_required_en: Depends on the trust, NGO, and the support or partnership being requested.

summary_en: A listing structure for Jain hostels and student accommodation support references that can be reviewed city by city.
eligibility_en: Varies by hostel, city, education level, and availability.
benefit_en: Can help students and families identify places to verify directly when relocating for study.
documents_required_en: Institutions or hostels may ask for admission proof, ID documents, guardian details, and local rules acceptance.

summary_en: A careful directory placeholder for charitable medical aid, seva networks, and emergency support references connected with Jain organizations.
eligibility_en: Support rules depend on the trust, hospital partner, fund criteria, and local verification requirements.
benefit_en: Helps families identify possible support channels that must still be verified directly with the relevant trust or provider.
documents_required_en: Medical records, identity proof, income proof, recommendation letters, or hospital documents may be required.

title_en: How to verify government scheme eligibility
title_hi: How to verify government scheme eligibility
summary_en: A step-by-step guide to checking whether a scheme is current, whether it applies to your category or state, and whether the website or circular is official.
summary_hi: How to verify government scheme eligibility
eligibility_en: Useful for applicants, volunteers, and family members helping someone review a scheme.
benefit_en: Reduces confusion by encouraging users to confirm current notifications, deadlines, and official portals before applying.
documents_required_en: No fixed documents for the guide itself. Use the relevant official notice to confirm application requirements.

title_en: Report a resource update or correction
title_hi: Report a resource update or correction
summary_en: Use this entry to report a broken link, changed eligibility note, outdated deadline reference, or a missing official source.
summary_hi: Report a resource update or correction
eligibility_en: Open to users, students, families, institutions, and contributors who notice an issue.
benefit_en: Helps keep public resource pages more accurate over time.
documents_required_en: Please share the page title, issue, and the best official source link if available.
